activeSlice.name: winui-zip-v1.0.4-explorer-path-hotfix
activeSlice.goal: publish a v1.0.4 portable WinUI ZIP that preserves the friendly wrapper layout while preventing Windows Explorer 0x80010135 path-too-long extraction failures seen in v1.0.3
activeSlice.claimBoundary: release packaging hotfix only; no app feature, runtime proof, online multiplayer, installer/signing, SmartScreen, or gameplay parity claim
latestFindings: v1.0.3 remains a historical published release but is superseded because normal Downloads extraction can fail on deep lore-book proof-plan paths.
v1.0.4 candidate ZIP SHA-256 is 641f17a44343e19efa858af30d6194f6e2b844f06d35a5753b3eb03156ac72b3 and byte size is 243908905.
v1.0.4 packages 53 deterministic BOOK.md-linked Lore reader files; max ZIP entry length is 95 characters within the 180-character Explorer-safe budget.
Package probe now rejects Explorer-unsafe long ZIP entries and raw root DLL/EXE layouts.
